Implemented list_importable_actions production route (ContractSchema, WebApp, SyncManager._readDocDataRows) and Import tab render (WorkspaceAddonCard, grouped CardSections with link header + CHECK_BOX SelectionInput per frozen contract). Verified end-to-end against deployed test webapp: cross-team listing, self-exclusion, resolved-status exclusion, and TeamNotFound access-denial all return correct shapes/log tags.

Implemented _submitImport (EditorAddonCard.js) per frozen contract: collects union of importSelection::* checkbox values (_collectImportSelection, supports both e.formInputs arrays and e.formInput comma-strings), re-fetches authoritative rows via list_importable_actions (ADR-0008 - never trusts client text), computes baseN once via _getNextActionN and assigns baseN+k sequential AI-N. Refactored _insertActionChip into _resolveCursorIndex (cursor->REST index, resolved once) + _applyActionFragment (shared single-fragment batchUpdate builder returning insertedLength) so single-create and multi-import share one chip path (no fork). Multi-insert advances a local REST index by insertedLength per fragment, precedeWithNewline=true for k>0. New rows written via existing upsert_action_rows in one batch. Added 'Select all' (onImportSelectAll, re-renders Import tab with selectAllImports=true -> _buildImportTabSection selectAll param) and 'Import selected' buttons to _buildImportTabSection. AC-3 forward_action_rows call wired in at the end of _submitImport. Log tag IMPORT_SELECTED.done {inserted, baseN}. Deployed to TEST (npm run deploy:test) and smoke-verified list_importable_actions still responds correctly post-refactor.

Implemented forward_action_rows production route (WebApp.js _handleForwardActionRows, dispatched in doPost, added to CONTRACT_SCHEMA routeNames+messages, ContractSchema.json regenerated via npm run export-contract). Per forwarded row: Status='Forwarded', Action text gets suffix ' [Forward:<targetDocName> AI-<n>]' (newAiToken via parseGlobalId(newGlobalId).actionId), then _remarkRowDirty (reused, no new dirty path). Response {ok:true, forwarded:[sourceGlobalId...]}, log tag FORWARD_ROWS.done. isResolved() extension was NOT needed - 'forwarded' is already a isDelegated() word (SyncManager.js:1324), confirmed isResolved('Forwarded')===true, so Forwarded actions already drop out of list_importable_actions/open counts automatically. Wired into _submitImport (fgh4) after upsert succeeds, passing {sourceGlobalId,newGlobalId} mapping + doc.getName(). Deployed to TEST and smoke-verified forward_action_rows({forwards:[],...}) returns {ok:true,forwarded:[]} confirming dispatch wiring. Full e2e journey (AC-1->AC-2->AC-3 with real doc mutations) is GTaskSheet-4gsx's scope - did not mutate canonical shared fixture rows here to avoid corrupting other tests' state.
